message:
Add optional WASM feature and apply rustfmt import ordering

Cargo.toml:
- Add optional wasm feature flag
- Add wasm-bindgen, console_error_panic_hook, js-sys as optional deps
- Feature enables WebAssembly compilation target support

Code style (async_decode.rs, mod.rs):
- Reorder imports to match rustfmt conventions (alphabetical)
- Simplify .iter().map().collect() chain formatting
- No functional changes

Also syncs beads issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
